headline: Is GE Vernova Stock Outperforming the S&P 500?
summary: GE Vernova has considerably outperformed the S&P 500 recently, and analysts remain highly optimistic about the stock’s prospects.

headline: GE Vernova secures IVPC Group contract for 100 MW wind farm in Italy
summary: GE Vernova has secured a contract from IVPC Group to provide onshore wind turbines to a new wind farm in Italy.

headline: GE Vernova to supply 17 turbines for 100MW Italian wind farm
summary: IVPC Group, a renewable energy operator, awarded the contract to GE Vernova.
